arguments.argument:
event_inherited() makeActive() setCollisionBounds(-14,-56,14,-1) image_speed=0.075
//Enemy base statistics eName="Desert Titan" eLevel=22 maxLife=700 life=maxLife pointWorth=33 atkPower=6 resType[0]=2 resType[2]=4 resType[3]=2 resType[4]=4 resType[5]=2 stunResist=6 baseItemChance=75 moneyWorth=10 dieEffect=0
runAcc=1 rockTime=60 rockDelay=140
deathAnim=0
jeremyText="This is a large hulking mass of possible annoyance. It only tracks you slowly left and right, however it will periodically stop. When it does this, it summons a bunch of rocks from above it, which will all drop. I don't recommend leaving these around at high places." chaoText="That's not very fair that none of these have to deal with the heat like you do." devText="The heat/water mechanic in this area was borrowed from another early game I made which featured a large desert. It used an overhead perspective and water wasn't always easy to find."
